package.name: cortex_action
package.description:
Action layer: what the robot does on the PC side. Today that is speech — tts_node (text -> Naver CLOVA Voice -> resample to the 16 kHz wire format -> AudioPCM, cancelable on barge-in / E-STOP).
The other actions (navigation, VLA) are NOT here: they are real-time control that runs next to the hardware, so cortex only dispatches to them through the cognition layer's connectors. Where those modules are built and launched depends on which host they run on — see the README.
